summary: The implementation successfully addresses all four requirements. REQ-14 is fully implemented with the ProfilePage component at /profile route. REQ-15 is implemented with a Profile navigation link in the Layout header. REQ-16 is implemented with enhanced UserProfile type including bio, yearOfStudy, and department fields in backend/main.mo, plus migration logic in backend/migration.mo. REQ-17 is implemented with proper form fields, validation, and character limits in the ProfilePage component.
